name: Wild Duck Gumbo- Part 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, brown duck in batches in oil. Remove and set aside.
2. Discard all but 2/3 cup drippings.
3. Add flour to the remaining drippings; cook and stir until brown, about 12-14 minutes.
4. Add sausage, onion, green pepper, celery, parsley, and garlic. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the next 8 ingredients; mix well.
6. Return the duck to the pan and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 60-75 minutes or until the duck is tender. Remove the duck.
8. Cool. Debone and cut into chunks; return to the pan. Simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes or until heated through.
9. Remove bay leaves. Serve with rice.
